ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "url_key" TEXT /* URL key for the page */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the page */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the page is active or not */,
  "is_anchor" INTEGER /* Whether the page is an anchor page or not */,
  "include_in_menu" INTEGER /* Whether the page is included in the menu or not */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the page in the menu */,
  "display_mode" TEXT /* Display mode of the page (e.g., PAGE, CATEGORY) */,
  "page_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the page (e.g., 1column, 2columns) */,
  "custom_layout_update" TEXT /* Custom layout update for the page */,
  "require_media" INTEGER /* Whether the page requires media or not */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the page was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the page was last updated */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of page (e.g., sale, product collection, informational) */,
  "meta_title" TEXT /* Meta title for SEO optimization */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description for SEO optimization */,
  "meta_keywords" TEXT /* Meta keywords for SEO optimization */,
  "header_image" TEXT /* URL of the header image for the page */,
  "hero_image" TEXT /* URL of the hero image for the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchical relationship */,
  "parent_page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent page */,
  "child_page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_hierarchy_parent_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_hierarchy_child_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_layouts" (
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layout */,
  "layout_name" TEXT /* Name of the layout (e.g., 1column, 2columns) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layout */,
  "layout_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the layout */,
  "layout_thumbnail" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail image for the layout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page the media is associated with */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media */,
  "media_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the media */,
  "media_category" TEXT /* Category of the media (e.g., image, video, audio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_media_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, editor, developer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role is associated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page the log entry is associated with */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., create, edit, delete) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_logs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_logs_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view entry */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page the view entry is associated with */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the page */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the viewer's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page the performance entry is associated with */,
  "load_time" REAL /* Average load time of the page in seconds */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Average bounce rate of the page */,
  "exit_rate" REAL /* Average exit rate of the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_performance_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)
